titleStmt.title: SII 22.355: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 355. (A.R. No. 355 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. (MĀR.) SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA I—14th Year (A.D. 1229-30).

summary.p: The king is given the attribute “who presented the Chōḷa country” as in the inscription above. This records a further gift made by the same donor Śaṅkaraṉ Kaṇḍaṉ providing by means of an agreement with the nāṭṭār for the supply of 10 kalam and 5 kuṟaṇi of paddy every year by the nāṭṭār of Malai- nāḍu (probably by some investment with them), for the offering of Tiruppāvāḍaiamudu to the deity after being taken in procession to the garden (Tiruvēṭṭaittōppu) called the Tyāgañjiriyān-tiruttōppu on the respective days of festival in the months of Mārgaḻi, Māśi and Paṅguni.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya śrī cuntara pāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu patinālāvatu malaimaṇṭalattu kuḷattūr caṅkaraṉ kaṇṭaṉāṉa kalikaṭinta pāṇṭiya tevaṉeṉ Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku tiruveṭṭai toppāka veḷḷāṟṟuk kiḻkaraiyil
cikaranallūrpaṟṟil Ivvūr tampirāntoḻaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārpakkalum Āccampi kotaṇṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkalum ṉān vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta tiyākañciriyāṉ tiruveṭṭaittoppil Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiyaṉāyaṉār tiruṉāḷ muṉṟilum tiruveṭṭai Eḻuntaruḷi tiruppāvāṭai
amutu ceytaruḷa malainnāṭṭu nāṭṭārpakkal Upaiyattukku nāṉ koṇṭa piramāṇappaṭiye nellup patinkalane Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku tiruveṭṭai Eḻuntaruḷi tiruppāvāṭai Amutu ceytaruḷa tiruvamutarici kalamāka tiruṉāḷ muṉṟukkut tiruvamutarici
mukkalattukkum Iraṇṭañcāka nel Eḻukalane tūṇippatakkuṅ kaṟiyamutuṭ paṭṭa pala viñcaṉaṅkaḷukku nellu Irukalane Irutūṇimukkuṟuṇiyumāka nellup patinkalane Aykuṟuṇiyum patinālāvatu tirumārkaḻi tirunāḷukkun tirumācit tirunāḷukkun tiruppaṅkunittiruṉāḷukkum viḷaiyilum viḷaiyāviṭi
lun tiyākañciriyān tiruttoppil cerapāṇṭiyan tirumaṇṭapatte Aḷakkakkaṭavārkaḷāka Eṉakkavarkaḷeḻutittanta piramāṇappaṭiye cantirātittatavaṟ celvatāka Ātitaṇṭeśvavaratevar cikattattile nirvārttukkuṭutteṉ caṅkaraṉ kaṇṭanāṉa kalikaṭinta pāṇṭiya tevaṉeṉ Ivai taiyūr nāṭṭu
veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vayalakanāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai teṉ koṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Amaraṉ Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruñāṉa campantaṉ taṟkuṟiyātaṉmaikku taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉ muṟaippaṭippāṭuvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aracu kaliyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pūpālaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuppaitevaṉ taṟkuṟiyātaṉmaikku cem
piyaṉ koṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu nāṭu paṇikka Upaiyappiramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ nāṭṭukkaṇakkaril tukkiṉāṉ nakkaṉ Eḻuttu Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
